sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
magenta = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 4]
print("Magenta squares (top-left):")
for m in sorted(magenta, key=lambda x: (x['boundary'][0][0], x['boundary'][0][1])):
    print(f"  TL: ({m['boundary'][0][0]}, {m['boundary'][0][1]})")

blue = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"\nBlue objects: {len(blue)}")
for b in blue:
    print(f"  {b['color']}: {b['pixels']}px")

# Let me also check if there are any new objects or changes
print("\nAll objects:")
for n in seg:
    if n['pixels'] < 100:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, TL=({n['boundary'][0][0]}, {n['boundary'][0][1]})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
